text: ‘Proactively fall in line:’ Holocaust Memorial Museum quietly changed content after Trump returned to office - Politico

text: Trump is trying to build a massive voter database. Election officials are afraid of what he’ll do with it - CNN

text: In Lebanon, more than 50 medics have been killed by Israel. Some say they're targeted - NPR
fullText: Lebanon says at least 54 health workers are among more than 1,400 people killed by Israel during the current invasion. Human rights groups say first responders are being targeted — something Israel denies.
